data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for detailed preparation instructions and related information for the booking lifecycle. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence of these preparation instructions or related content. The only related evidence pertains to other email templates that do not address the specific needs outlined in the requirement, indicating a gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence of detailed prep instructions, forms link, FAQ, contact info, or weather forecast.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
